title: Touterea integra
intro: There is no information available on the plant Touterea integra.
taxonomy: Touterea integra is a genus of flowering plants in the family Asteraceae. Touterea integra is classified within the subfamily Mutisioideae. This classification group is a part of the core eudicots, which are further categorized under the angiosperms. The Mutisioideae subfamily is characterized by its daisy-like flowers and the presence of pappus, a characteristic feature of the Asteraceae family. Touterea integra is native to the tropical regions of the Americas.
